name: RPG (Part 4)
description:
✨🥀 Welcome back, wanderer of my Rpgs… 🥀✨
You’ve walked through many stories before. You’ve been chosen, tested, hunted… (¬‿¬)
But now, everything changes.

🔹 In Part 1, you were the heir of legacy — carrying the fragile hopes of a hero’s bloodline.
🔹 In Part 2, you walked as the transfer — a stranger cloaked in mystery, secrets burning in your veins.
🔹 In Part 3, you became the Vigilante — the one who is standing in the cracks of a broken society.

But this time…
💀 This is Part 4 — The Villain’s Requiem. 💀

No masks. No illusions. No more pretending.
You are not a hero. You are not a savior.
You are a Villain — and the world trembles at your freedom.

Society painted you as a curse, a disaster waiting to happen.
The Commission brands you an abomination.
Heroes sharpen their blades to cut you down.
And yet… they cannot erase what you are.

👁️ You are unbound.

  • You can wield any Quirk you desire, shaping reality with your will.

  • You can walk alone, carving your legend in blood and fire.

  • Or you can descend into the League of Villains, twisting fate beside others who thrive in chaos.

  • You may be vengeance, an experiment finally unleashed from its cage 🧪, or simply a soul that rejects their fragile “justice.”

The world is rotting. 🌑
In the neon-lit underbelly of Tokyo, black-market kings and Quirk traders whisper of your rise.
In the ruined industrial zones, gangs already carve your name into rusted walls.
Even in the halls of power, corrupt officials look over their shoulders, fearing the shadow that moves without chains.

And now the people whisper…
Is your name a curse?
Or is it a prayer, muttered by those who are tired of heroes who never saved them?

(≖ ‿ ≖ ✿) You are not hope. You are not light.
You are the storm they tried to silence — the hand that strikes from the dark, the chaos they cannot contain.

🌒 No more rules. No more mercy. No more cages.
This is not their story anymore.

This is your reign.
This is the Villain RPG.

✨🔥 Welcome to the Ultimate Villain RPG 🔥✨
(A world where imagination itself becomes your weapon.)

Have you ever felt that other RPGs are too small for your dreams? Too many rules, too many limits — where the “villain” is just a side note, and the world forces you to follow the same story again and again?
(╯°□°)╯︵ ┻━┻

Not here. Not in this world. 🖤

Here, you are the Villain.
Not a background character, not a stepping stone for some bland hero’s glory — you’re the storm that shakes the universe. 🌌

💀 Want to stand face-to-face against All Might and bring the Symbol of Peace to his knees? Do it.
🦇 Want to build an empire so terrifying that even Batman calls you his worst nightmare? Done.
⚡ Want to merge timelines, rip open dimensions, and bring the Justice League, the Avengers, and even Anime Gods into a single battlefield where you stand at the center? That’s your right.
🎭 Want to be the twisted billionaire genius who toys with nations, building weapons, cloning heroes, creating worlds? That’s yours to claim.

This isn’t just My Hero Academia.
This is ALL stories. All universes. All games. All animes. All legends.
🕹️ Sekiro’s blade against All For One.
🩸 Doom Slayer facing Shigaraki in a ruined city.
🌌 Ben 10’s Omnitrix falling into your hands — and you rewriting his entire legacy.
🔥 You could even forge the “strongest cursed weapon” no one has ever seen, something that makes even Thanos whisper your name.
creator: Code_comet_
